input.command:
echo "=== /Applications/coh symlink confirmed ==="
echo "  /Applications/coh -> $(readlink /Applications/coh)  [symlink, 0B, no duplication ✅]"
echo
echo "=== rest of CoHModdingTool applet (the LAUNCH part) ==="
osadecompile /Applications/CoHModdingTool.app/Contents/Resources/Scripts/main.scpt 2>/dev/null | tail -50
echo
echo "=== has CityModInstaller support dir been seeded yet? ==="
ls -la ~/Library/Application\ Support/CityModInstaller/ 2>/dev/null || echo "  (not yet seeded — tool hasn't been run, or seeds on first run)"
echo
echo "=== modder.db schema (what the tool tracks) ==="
sqlite3 /Applications/CoHModdingTool.app/Contents/Resources/modder.db ".tables" 2>/dev/null || echo "  (sqlite3 can't read or db locked)"
echo "--- schema ---"
sqlite3 /Applications/CoHModdingTool.app/Contents/Resources/modder.db ".schema" 2>/dev/null | head -40
input.description: Read launch logic, check seeding, dump modder.db schema
